title: ResponseData
description: Payload for NOTE_ADDED and NOTE_UPDATED (single response) SSE events. Maps to RetroEvent.ResponseData Java record.

stepId.description: ID of the retro step this response belongs to

participantId.description: UUID of the participant who submitted the response

displaySummary.description: Short summary of the response content for display

isVisible.description: Whether the response is visible to all participants

submittedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the response was submitted
